name: mcp-app-tase-market
description: MCP App for TASE (Tel Aviv Stock Exchange) end of day data visualization

scripts.build: tsc --noEmit && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/market-end-of-day/market-end-of-day-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/market-spirit/market-spirit-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/my-position-end-of-day/my-position-end-of-day-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/symbol-candlestick/symbol-candlestick-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/symbol-intraday-candlestick/symbol-intraday-candlestick-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/my-position-candlestick/my-position-candlestick-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/tase-market-home/tase-market-home-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/market-sector-heatmap/market-sector-heatmap-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/my-position-table/my-position-table-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/my-positions-manager/my-positions-manager-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/symbols-candlestick/symbols-candlestick-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/symbols-table/symbols-table-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/symbols-end-of-day/symbols-end-of-day-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/market-last-update/market-last-update-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/tase-market-settings/tase-market-settings-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/watchlist-manager/watchlist-manager-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/watchlist-table/watchlist-table-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/watchlist-end-of-day/watchlist-end-of-day-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/watchlist-candlestick/watchlist-candlestick-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/symbol-end-of-days/symbol-end-of-days-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/market-momentum/market-momentum-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/market-anticipation/market-anticipation-widget.html vite build && cross-env INPUT=src/widgets/index-sector-breakdown/index-sector-breakdown-widget.html vite build
scripts.dev: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently 'npm run watch' 'tsx --watch main.ts'
scripts.deploy:prod: git checkout production && git merge main && git push origin production && git checkout main
scripts.migrate:prod: env $(grep -v '^#' .env.production.local | grep -v '^$' | xargs) npx prisma migrate deploy
